THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT OF CALIFORNIA, SANTA CLARA COUNTY. THE COST AND FEES NECESSARY TO TRANSFER THE ACTION TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY SHALL BE PAID BY TRACY SPENCER, IN HIS OWN CAPACITY AND AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO THE ESTATE OF DECEDENT MERCEDES SPENCER, PURSUANT TO CCP 399. DEFENDANTS' REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER #5976.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Continued To Jun-26-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CARTER M. ZINN, ESQ., 415.292.4100, FOR PLAINTIFF TRACY SPENCER.
KIRK G. NEIBERGER, ESQ., 916.929.9600, FOR DEFENDANTS IRENE SONU, GLENN LUTCHMAN, ALLEN COOPER, STANFORD HOSPITAL AND CLINICS, STANFORD MEDICINE, EMELYN LEUNG, AND IMELDA SANIDAD.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs IRENE SONU, GLENN LUTCHMAN, ALLEN COOPER, STANFORD HOSPITAL AND CLINICS, STANFORD MEDICINE, EMELYN LEUNG, IMELDA SANIDAD's Motion To Change Venue And Request For Sanctions is granted. Defendants have met their burden of demonstrating that Plaintiff's venue selection of San Francisco County is improper pursuant to CCP 396b. Defendant Allen Cooper does not reside in San Francisco County for purposes of venue. Since Dr. Cooper's purported residence in San Francisco was the only basis for venue in San Francisco County (CCP 395(a)), the motion to change venue is granted. The case is transferred to Superior Court of California, Santa Clara County. The cost and fees necessary to transfer the action to Santa Clara County shall be paid by Tracy Spencer, in His Own Capacity and as Successor in Interest to the Estate of Decedent Mercedes Spencer, pursuant to CCP 399. Defendants' request for sanctions is denied. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Change Venue And Req. For Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-25-2013 Continued To Apr-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
